meanings.geomancy.figure.via: Via signals change, movement and journeys, marking a turning point where one path closes and another opens.
meanings.geomancy.figure.cauda_draconis: Cauda Draconis marks endings and departures, favouring the release of what is finished though it may leave disorder in its wake.
meanings.geomancy.figure.puer: Puer denotes youthful, headstrong energy that brings boldness and swift action but also impulsiveness and conflict.
meanings.geomancy.figure.fortuna_minor: Fortuna Minor brings fleeting, modest fortune that favours swift action taken with outside help rather than lasting gain.
meanings.geomancy.figure.caput_draconis: Caput Draconis heralds beginnings and fresh opportunity, an auspicious threshold for new ventures and growth.
meanings.geomancy.figure.coniunctio: Coniunctio signifies union, meetings and partnerships, bringing people, matters or ideas together for good or ill.
meanings.geomancy.figure.acquisitio: Acquisitio is a figure of gain and profit, promising the successful acquisition of wealth, goods or desired ends.
meanings.geomancy.figure.rubeus: Rubeus warns of passion, anger and deceit, an unfavourable figure best handled with caution and restraint.
meanings.geomancy.figure.puella: Puella signifies harmony, beauty and affection, a gentle and favourable figure especially in matters of love and pleasure.
meanings.geomancy.figure.amissio: Amissio denotes loss and letting go, unfavourable for keeping things yet helpful when release is what is sought.
meanings.geomancy.figure.carcer: Carcer represents confinement, delay and restriction, binding matters in place and counselling patience.
meanings.geomancy.figure.laetitia: Laetitia is a joyful figure of happiness, health and hope, lifting the spirits and favouring upward progress.
meanings.geomancy.figure.fortuna_maior: Fortuna Maior brings great and lasting good fortune, success won through one's own steady strength and inner resources.
meanings.geomancy.figure.albus: Albus signifies clarity, peace and wisdom, a calm and favourable figure suited to thought, counsel and careful judgement.
meanings.geomancy.figure.tristitia: Tristitia denotes sorrow, hardship and melancholy, a downward figure counselling endurance through difficult times.
meanings.geomancy.figure.populus: Populus represents the crowd or gathering, a neutral and passive figure that reflects surrounding influences without acting of its own accord.
